hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_response.filePath // .tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx)$' && { ERRORS=$(npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | head -10); if [ -n "$ERRORS" ]; then echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PostToolUse\",\"additionalContext\":\"TypeScript errors after editing $f:\n$ERRORS\"}}"; fi; }; } 2>/dev/null || true
